title: Secretary Rubio’s Meeting with Greek Foreign Minister Gerapetritis
description: The following is attributable to Principal Deputy Spokesperson Tommy Pigott: Secretary of State Marco Rubio met with Greek Foreign Minister Giorgos Gerapetritis today to advance the U.S.-Greece strategic partnership.  The leaders discussed expanding U.S.-Greece energy cooperation and commercial ties, promoting European defense and regional security, and addressing illegal migration.
